SELECT count(*)::int

SELECT c1.complaint_id, c1.category_id, c1.closed_at, c1.complaint_description, c1.complaint_title, c1.created_at, c1.current_handler_employee_id, c1.escalation_due_at, c1.escalation_level, c1.priority_id, c1.raised_by_employee_id, c1.reopened_count, c1.resolved_at, c1.status_id, c1.updated_at, c0.status_id, c0.is_terminal, c0.status_name, p.priority_id, p.escalation_order, p.priority_name, c2.category_id, c2.category_name, c2.created_at, c2.default_priority_id, c2.department_id, c2.is_active, c2.sla_hours, c2.updated_at, d.department_id, d.created_at, d.department_head_employee_id, d.department_name, d.is_active, d.updated_at, e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.role_id, e.updated_at, e0.employee_id, e0.created_at, e0.department_id, e0.email, e0.employee_name, e0.is_active, e0.mobile_number, e0.password_hash, e0.role_id, e0.updated_at
FROM (
    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at
    FROM complaints AS c
    WHERE c.current_handler_employee_id = @employeeId AND c.status_id IN (2, 3, 4)
    ORDER BY c.escalation_due_at
    LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p
) AS c1
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c1.status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c1.priority_id = p.priority_id
INNER JOIN categories AS c2 ON c1.category_id = c2.category_id
INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c2.department_id = d.department_id
INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c1.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c1.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
ORDER BY c1.escalation_due_at

SELECT c1.request_id, c1.complaint_id, c1.created_at, c1.remarks, c1.request_status_id, c1.request_type_id, c1.requested_by, c1.reviewed_at, c1.reviewed_by, c0.complaint_id, c0.category_id, c0.closed_at, c0.complaint_description, c0.complaint_title, c0.created_at, c0.current_handler_employee_id, c0.escalation_due_at, c0.escalation_level, c0.priority_id, c0.raised_by_employee_id, c0.reopened_count, c0.resolved_at, c0.status_id, c0.updated_at, r.request_type_id, r.request_type_name, r0.request_status_id, r0.status_name, e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.role_id, e.updated_at, e0.employee_id, e0.created_at, e0.department_id, e0.email, e0.employee_name, e0.is_active, e0.mobile_number, e0.password_hash, e0.role_id, e0.updated_at
FROM (
    SELECT c.request_id, c.complaint_id, c.created_at, c.remarks, c.request_status_id, c.request_type_id, c.requested_by, c.reviewed_at, c.reviewed_by
    FROM complaint_requests AS c
    WHERE c.request_type_id = @requestTypeId_Value
    ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
    LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p
) AS c1
INNER JOIN complaints AS c0 ON c1.complaint_id = c0.complaint_id
INNER JOIN request_types AS r ON c1.request_type_id = r.request_type_id
INNER JOIN request_statuses AS r0 ON c1.request_status_id = r0.request_status_id
INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c1.requested_by = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c1.reviewed_by = e0.employee_id
ORDER BY c1.created_at DESC

SELECT c1.request_id, c1.complaint_id, c1.created_at, c1.remarks, c1.request_status_id, c1.request_type_id, c1.requested_by, c1.reviewed_at, c1.reviewed_by, c0.complaint_id, c0.category_id, c0.closed_at, c0.complaint_description, c0.complaint_title, c0.created_at, c0.current_handler_employee_id, c0.escalation_due_at, c0.escalation_level, c0.priority_id, c0.raised_by_employee_id, c0.reopened_count, c0.resolved_at, c0.status_id, c0.updated_at, r.request_type_id, r.request_type_name, r0.request_status_id, r0.status_name, e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.role_id, e.updated_at, e0.employee_id, e0.created_at, e0.department_id, e0.email, e0.employee_name, e0.is_active, e0.mobile_number, e0.password_hash, e0.role_id, e0.updated_at
FROM (
    SELECT c.request_id, c.complaint_id, c.created_at, c.remarks, c.request_status_id, c.request_type_id, c.requested_by, c.reviewed_at, c.reviewed_by
    FROM complaint_requests AS c
    WHERE c.request_type_id = @requestTypeId_Value
    ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
    LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p
) AS c1
INNER JOIN complaints AS c0 ON c1.complaint_id = c0.complaint_id
INNER JOIN request_types AS r ON c1.request_type_id = r.request_type_id
INNER JOIN request_statuses AS r0 ON c1.request_status_id = r0.request_status_id
INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c1.requested_by = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c1.reviewed_by = e0.employee_id
ORDER BY c1.created_at DESC

FROM (
    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at
    FROM complaints AS c
    WHERE c.current_handler_employee_id = @employeeId AND c.status_id IN (2, 3, 4)
    ORDER BY c.escalation_due_at
    LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p
) AS c1
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c1.status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c1.priority_id = p.priority_id
INNER JOIN categories AS c2 ON c1.category_id = c2.category_id
INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c2.department_id = d.department_id
INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c1.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c1.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
ORDER BY c1.escalation_due_at

SELECT c1.complaint_id, c1.category_id, c1.closed_at, c1.complaint_description, c1.complaint_title, c1.created_at, c1.current_handler_employee_id, c1.escalation_due_at, c1.escalation_level, c1.priority_id, c1.raised_by_employee_id, c1.reopened_count, c1.resolved_at, c1.status_id, c1.updated_at, c0.status_id, c0.is_terminal, c0.status_name, p.priority_id, p.escalation_order, p.priority_name, c2.category_id, c2.category_name, c2.created_at, c2.default_priority_id, c2.department_id, c2.is_active, c2.sla_hours, c2.updated_at, d.department_id, d.created_at, d.department_head_employee_id, d.department_name, d.is_active, d.updated_at, e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.role_id, e.updated_at, e0.employee_id, e0.created_at, e0.department_id, e0.email, e0.employee_name, e0.is_active, e0.mobile_number, e0.password_hash, e0.role_id, e0.updated_at
FROM (
    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at
    FROM complaints AS c
    WHERE c.current_handler_employee_id = @employeeId AND c.status_id IN (2, 3, 4)
    ORDER BY c.escalation_due_at
    LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p
) AS c1
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c1.status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c1.priority_id = p.priority_id
INNER JOIN categories AS c2 ON c1.category_id = c2.category_id
INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c2.department_id = d.department_id
INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c1.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c1.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
ORDER BY c1.escalation_due_at

FROM (
    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at
    FROM complaints AS c
    WHERE c.current_handler_employee_id = @employeeId AND c.status_id IN (2, 3, 4)
    ORDER BY c.escalation_due_at
    LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p
) AS c1
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c1.status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c1.priority_id = p.priority_id
INNER JOIN categories AS c2 ON c1.category_id = c2.category_id
INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c2.department_id = d.department_id
INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c1.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c1.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
ORDER BY c1.escalation_due_at

SELECT c.category_id AS "CategoryId", c0.category_name AS "CategoryName", d.department_name AS "DepartmentName", count(*)::int AS "ComplaintCount"
FROM complaints AS c
INNER JOIN categories AS c0 ON c.category_id = c0.category_id
INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c0.department_id = d.department_id
GROUP BY c.category_id, c0.category_name, d.department_name

SELECT c1.request_id, c1.complaint_id, c1.created_at, c1.remarks, c1.request_status_id, c1.request_type_id, c1.requested_by, c1.reviewed_at, c1.reviewed_by, c0.complaint_id, c0.category_id, c0.closed_at, c0.complaint_description, c0.complaint_title, c0.created_at, c0.current_handler_employee_id, c0.escalation_due_at, c0.escalation_level, c0.priority_id, c0.raised_by_employee_id, c0.reopened_count, c0.resolved_at, c0.status_id, c0.updated_at, r.request_type_id, r.request_type_name, r0.request_status_id, r0.status_name, e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.role_id, e.updated_at, e0.employee_id, e0.created_at, e0.department_id, e0.email, e0.employee_name, e0.is_active, e0.mobile_number, e0.password_hash, e0.role_id, e0.updated_at
FROM (
    SELECT c.request_id, c.complaint_id, c.created_at, c.remarks, c.request_status_id, c.request_type_id, c.requested_by, c.reviewed_at, c.reviewed_by
    FROM complaint_requests AS c
    WHERE c.request_type_id = @requestTypeId_Value
    ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
    LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p
) AS c1
INNER JOIN complaints AS c0 ON c1.complaint_id = c0.complaint_id
INNER JOIN request_types AS r ON c1.request_type_id = r.request_type_id
INNER JOIN request_statuses AS r0 ON c1.request_status_id = r0.request_status_id
INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c1.requested_by = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c1.reviewed_by = e0.employee_id
ORDER BY c1.created_at DESC

FROM (

    FROM complaint_requests AS c
    WHERE c.request_type_id = @requestTypeId_Value AND c.request_status_id = @statusId_Value

    LIMIT @p3 OFFSET @p
) AS c1

LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c1.reviewed_by = e0.employee_id
ORDER BY c1.created_at DESC

) AS c1
INNER JOIN complaints AS c0 ON c1.complaint_id = c0.complaint_id

LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c1.reviewed_by = e0.employee_id
ORDER BY c1.created_at DESC

SELECT v.category_name, v.closed_at, v.complaint_id, v.complaint_title, v.created_at, v.current_handler_name, v.current_handler_role, v.department_name, v.escalation_due_at, v.escalation_level, v.is_terminal, v.priority_name, v.priority_weight, v.raised_by_name, v.reopened_count, v.resolved_at, v.status_name, v.updated_at
FROM v_complaint_dashboard AS v
INNER JOIN complaints AS c ON v.complaint_id = c.complaint_id
INNER JOIN categories AS c0 ON c.category_id = c0.category_id
WHERE (c0.department_id = @deptIdFilter OR c.raised_by_employee_id = @employeeIdFilter) AND c0.department_id = @departmentId_Value
ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
LIMIT @p4 OFFSET @p

FROM (
    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at, c0.category_id AS category_id0, c0.category_name, c0.created_at AS created_at0, c0.default_priority_id, c0.department_id, c0.is_active, c0.sla_hours, c0.updated_at AS updated_at0
    FROM complaints AS c
    INNER JOIN categories AS c0 ON c.category_id = c0.category_id
    WHERE c.current_handler_employee_id = @employeeId AND c.status_id IN (2, 3, 4) AND c0.department_id = @departmentId_Value
    ORDER BY c.escalation_due_at
    LIMIT @p3 OFFSET @p
) AS s
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c1 ON s.status_id = c1.status_id
INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON s.priority_id = p.priority_id
INNER JOIN departments AS d ON s.department_id = d.department_id
INNER JOIN employees AS e ON s.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON s.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
ORDER BY s.escalation_due_at

    ORDER BY c.escalation_due_at

) AS c1

INNER JOIN categories AS c2 ON c1.category_id = c2.category_id

INNER JOIN complaints AS c0 ON c1.complaint_id = c0.complaint_id
INNER JOIN request_types AS r ON c1.request_type_id = r.request_type_id
INNER JOIN request_statuses AS r0 ON c1.request_status_id = r0.request_status_id
INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c1.requested_by = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c1.reviewed_by = e0.employee_id
ORDER BY c1.created_at DESC

SELECT c1.request_id, c1.complaint_id, c1.created_at, c1.remarks, c1.request_status_id, c1.request_type_id, c1.requested_by, c1.reviewed_at, c1.reviewed_by, c0.complaint_id, c0.category_id, c0.closed_at, c0.complaint_description, c0.complaint_title, c0.created_at, c0.current_handler_employee_id, c0.escalation_due_at, c0.escalation_level, c0.priority_id, c0.raised_by_employee_id, c0.reopened_count, c0.resolved_at, c0.status_id, c0.updated_at, r.request_type_id, r.request_type_name, r0.request_status_id, r0.status_name, e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.role_id, e.updated_at, e0.employee_id, e0.created_at, e0.department_id, e0.email, e0.employee_name, e0.is_active, e0.mobile_number, e0.password_hash, e0.role_id, e0.updated_at
FROM (
    SELECT c.request_id, c.complaint_id, c.created_at, c.remarks, c.request_status_id, c.request_type_id, c.requested_by, c.reviewed_at, c.reviewed_by
    FROM complaint_requests AS c
    WHERE c.request_type_id = @requestTypeId_Value
    ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
    LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p
) AS c1
INNER JOIN complaints AS c0 ON c1.complaint_id = c0.complaint_id
INNER JOIN request_types AS r ON c1.request_type_id = r.request_type_id
INNER JOIN request_statuses AS r0 ON c1.request_status_id = r0.request_status_id
INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c1.requested_by = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c1.reviewed_by = e0.employee_id
ORDER BY c1.created_at DESC

    FROM complaints AS c
    INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c.status_id = c0.status_id
    INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c.priority_id = p.priority_id
    INNER JOIN categories AS c1 ON c.category_id = c1.category_id
    INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c1.department_id = d.department_id
    INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
    LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
    WHERE c.complaint_id = @id
    LIMIT 1
) AS s
LEFT JOIN complaint_attachments AS c2 ON s.complaint_id = c2.complaint_id

SELECT s.complaint_id, s.category_id, s.closed_at, s.complaint_description, s.complaint_title, s.created_at, s.current_handler_employee_id, s.escalation_due_at, s.escalation_level, s.priority_id, s.raised_by_employee_id, s.reopened_count, s.resolved_at, s.status_id, s.updated_at, s.status_id0, s.is_terminal, s.status_name, s.priority_id0, s.escalation_order, s.priority_name, s.category_id0, s.category_name, s.created_at0, s.default_priority_id, s.department_id, s.is_active, s.sla_hours, s.updated_at0, s.department_id0, s.created_at1, s.department_head_employee_id, s.department_name, s.is_active0, s.updated_at1, s.employee_id, s.created_at2, s.department_id1, s.email, s.employee_name, s.is_active1, s.mobile_number, s.password_hash, s.role_id, s.updated_at2, s.employee_id0, s.created_at3, s.department_id2, s.email0, s.employee_name0, s.is_active2, s.mobile_number0, s.password_hash0, s.role_id0, s.updated_at3, c2.attachment_id, c2.complaint_id, c2.created_at, c2.file_path, c2.file_size_bytes, c2.mime_type, c2.original_file_name, c2.uploaded_by
FROM (
    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at, c0.status_id AS status_id0, c0.is_terminal, c0.status_name, p.priority_id AS priority_id0, p.escalation_order, p.priority_name, c1.category_id AS category_id0, c1.category_name, c1.created_at AS created_at0, c1.default_priority_id, c1.department_id, c1.is_active, c1.sla_hours, c1.updated_at AS updated_at0, d.department_id AS department_id0, d.created_at AS created_at1, d.department_head_employee_id, d.department_name, d.is_active AS is_active0, d.updated_at AS updated_at1, e.employee_id, e.created_at AS created_at2, e.department_id AS department_id1, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active AS is_active1, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.role_id, e.updated_at AS updated_at2, e0.employee_id AS employee_id0, e0.created_at AS created_at3, e0.department_id AS department_id2, e0.email AS email0, e0.employee_name AS employee_name0, e0.is_active AS is_active2, e0.mobile_number AS mobile_number0, e0.password_hash AS password_hash0, e0.role_id AS role_id0, e0.updated_at AS updated_at3
    FROM complaints AS c
    INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c.status_id = c0.status_id
    INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c.priority_id = p.priority_id
    INNER JOIN categories AS c1 ON c.category_id = c1.category_id
    INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c1.department_id = d.department_id
    INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
    LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
    WHERE c.complaint_id = @id
    LIMIT 1
) AS s
LEFT JOIN complaint_attachments AS c2 ON s.complaint_id = c2.complaint_id
ORDER BY s.complaint_id, s.status_id0, s.priority_id0, s.category_id0, s.department_id0, s.employee_id, s.employee_id0

FROM (
    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at
    FROM complaints AS c
    WHERE c.current_handler_employee_id = @employeeId AND c.status_id IN (2, 3, 4)
    ORDER BY c.escalation_due_at
    LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p
) AS c1
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c1.status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c1.priority_id = p.priority_id
INNER JOIN categories AS c2 ON c1.category_id = c2.category_id
INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c2.department_id = d.department_id
INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c1.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c1.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
ORDER BY c1.escalation_due_at

SELECT c.category_id AS "CategoryId", c0.category_name AS "CategoryName", d.department_name AS "DepartmentName", count(*)::int AS "ComplaintCount"
FROM complaints AS c
INNER JOIN categories AS c0 ON c.category_id = c0.category_id
INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c0.department_id = d.department_id
GROUP BY c.category_id, c0.category_name, d.department_name
ORDER BY count(*)::int DESC
LIMIT @p

    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at, c0.status_id AS status_id0, c0.is_terminal, c0.status_name, p.priority_id AS priority_id0, p.escalation_order, p.priority_name, c1.category_id AS category_id0, c1.category_name, c1.created_at AS created_at0, c1.default_priority_id, c1.department_id, c1.is_active, c1.sla_hours, c1.updated_at AS updated_at0, d.department_id AS department_id0, d.created_at AS created_at1, d.department_head_employee_id, d.department_name, d.is_active AS is_active0, d.updated_at AS updated_at1, e.employee_id, e.created_at AS created_at2, e.department_id AS department_id1, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active AS is_active1, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.role_id, e.updated_at AS updated_at2, e0.employee_id AS employee_id0, e0.created_at AS created_at3, e0.department_id AS department_id2, e0.email AS email0, e0.employee_name AS employee_name0, e0.is_active AS is_active2, e0.mobile_number AS mobile_number0, e0.password_hash AS password_hash0, e0.role_id AS role_id0, e0.updated_at AS updated_at3
    FROM complaints AS c
    INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c.status_id = c0.status_id
    INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c.priority_id = p.priority_id
    INNER JOIN categories AS c1 ON c.category_id = c1.category_id
    INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c1.department_id = d.department_id
    INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
    LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
    WHERE c.complaint_id = @id
    LIMIT 1
) AS s
LEFT JOIN complaint_attachments AS c2 ON s.complaint_id = c2.complaint_id
ORDER BY s.complaint_id, s.status_id0, s.priority_id0, s.category_id0, s.department_id0, s.employee_id, s.employee_id0

FROM (
    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at
    FROM complaints AS c
    WHERE c.current_handler_employee_id = @employeeId AND c.status_id IN (2, 3, 4)
    ORDER BY c.escalation_due_at
    LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p
) AS c1
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c1.status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c1.priority_id = p.priority_id
INNER JOIN categories AS c2 ON c1.category_id = c2.category_id
INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c2.department_id = d.department_id
INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c1.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c1.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
ORDER BY c1.escalation_due_at

FROM (
    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at
    FROM complaints AS c
    WHERE c.current_handler_employee_id = @employeeId AND c.status_id IN (2, 3, 4)
    ORDER BY c.escalation_due_at
    LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p
) AS c1
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c1.status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c1.priority_id = p.priority_id
INNER JOIN categories AS c2 ON c1.category_id = c2.category_id
INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c2.department_id = d.department_id
INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c1.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c1.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
ORDER BY c1.escalation_due_at

SELECT c1.complaint_id, c1.category_id, c1.closed_at, c1.complaint_description, c1.complaint_title, c1.created_at, c1.current_handler_employee_id, c1.escalation_due_at, c1.escalation_level, c1.priority_id, c1.raised_by_employee_id, c1.reopened_count, c1.resolved_at, c1.status_id, c1.updated_at, c0.status_id, c0.is_terminal, c0.status_name, p.priority_id, p.escalation_order, p.priority_name, c2.category_id, c2.category_name, c2.created_at, c2.default_priority_id, c2.department_id, c2.is_active, c2.sla_hours, c2.updated_at, d.department_id, d.created_at, d.department_head_employee_id, d.department_name, d.is_active, d.updated_at, e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.role_id, e.updated_at, e0.employee_id, e0.created_at, e0.department_id, e0.email, e0.employee_name, e0.is_active, e0.mobile_number, e0.password_hash, e0.role_id, e0.updated_at
FROM (
    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at
    FROM complaints AS c
    WHERE c.current_handler_employee_id = @employeeId AND c.status_id IN (2, 3, 4)
    ORDER BY c.escalation_due_at
    LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p
) AS c1
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c1.status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c1.priority_id = p.priority_id
INNER JOIN categories AS c2 ON c1.category_id = c2.category_id
INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c2.department_id = d.department_id
INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c1.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c1.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
ORDER BY c1.escalation_due_at

SELECT c1.complaint_id, c1.category_id, c1.closed_at, c1.complaint_description, c1.complaint_title, c1.created_at, c1.current_handler_employee_id, c1.escalation_due_at, c1.escalation_level, c1.priority_id, c1.raised_by_employee_id, c1.reopened_count, c1.resolved_at, c1.status_id, c1.updated_at, c0.status_id, c0.is_terminal, c0.status_name, p.priority_id, p.escalation_order, p.priority_name, c2.category_id, c2.category_name, c2.created_at, c2.default_priority_id, c2.department_id, c2.is_active, c2.sla_hours, c2.updated_at, d.department_id, d.created_at, d.department_head_employee_id, d.department_name, d.is_active, d.updated_at, e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.role_id, e.updated_at, e0.employee_id, e0.created_at, e0.department_id, e0.email, e0.employee_name, e0.is_active, e0.mobile_number, e0.password_hash, e0.role_id, e0.updated_at
FROM (
    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at
    FROM complaints AS c
    WHERE c.current_handler_employee_id = @employeeId AND c.status_id IN (2, 3, 4)
    ORDER BY c.escalation_due_at
    LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p
) AS c1
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c1.status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c1.priority_id = p.priority_id
INNER JOIN categories AS c2 ON c1.category_id = c2.category_id
INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c2.department_id = d.department_id
INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c1.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c1.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
ORDER BY c1.escalation_due_at

    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at

) AS c1

    ORDER BY c.escalation_due_at
    LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p
) AS c1

INNER JOIN categories AS c2 ON c1.category_id = c2.category_id

ORDER BY c1.escalation_due_at

SELECT count(*)::int
FROM notifications AS n
WHERE n.employee_id = @employeeId AND n.is_read = @isRead_Value
2026-06-26 11:36:54.738 +05:30 [INF] Executed DbCommand (10ms) [Parameters=[@employeeId='?' (DbType = Int32), @isRead_Value='?' (DbType = Boolean), @p3='?' (DbType = Int32), @p='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT n1.notification_id, n1.created_at, n1.employee_id, n1.is_read, n1.message, n1.notification_type_id, n1.reference_complaint_id, n1.title, n0.notification_type_id, n0.notification_type_name
FROM (
    SELECT n.notification_id, n.created_at, n.employee_id, n.is_read, n.message, n.notification_type_id, n.reference_complaint_id, n.title
    FROM notifications AS n
    WHERE n.employee_id = @employeeId AND n.is_read = @isRead_Value
    ORDER BY n.created_at DESC
    LIMIT @p3 OFFSET @p
) AS n1
INNER JOIN notification_types AS n0 ON n1.notification_type_id = n0.notification_type_id
ORDER BY n1.created_at DESC

SELECT n1.notification_id, n1.created_at, n1.employee_id, n1.is_read, n1.message, n1.notification_type_id, n1.reference_complaint_id, n1.title, n0.notification_type_id, n0.notification_type_name
FROM (
    SELECT n.notification_id, n.created_at, n.employee_id, n.is_read, n.message, n.notification_type_id, n.reference_complaint_id, n.title
    FROM notifications AS n
    WHERE n.employee_id = @employeeId
    ORDER BY n.created_at DESC
    LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p
) AS n1
INNER JOIN notification_types AS n0 ON n1.notification_type_id = n0.notification_type_id
ORDER BY n1.created_at DESC

FROM (
    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at
    FROM complaints AS c
    WHERE c.current_handler_employee_id = @employeeId AND c.status_id IN (2, 3, 4)
    ORDER BY c.escalation_due_at
    LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p
) AS c1
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c1.status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c1.priority_id = p.priority_id
INNER JOIN categories AS c2 ON c1.category_id = c2.category_id
INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c2.department_id = d.department_id
INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c1.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c1.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
ORDER BY c1.escalation_due_at

SELECT c.category_id AS "CategoryId", c0.category_name AS "CategoryName", d.department_name AS "DepartmentName", count(*)::int AS "ComplaintCount"
FROM complaints AS c
INNER JOIN categories AS c0 ON c.category_id = c0.category_id
INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c0.department_id = d.department_id
GROUP BY c.category_id, c0.category_name, d.department_name
ORDER BY count(*)::int DESC
LIMIT @p

FROM (
    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at
    FROM complaints AS c
    WHERE c.current_handler_employee_id = @employeeId AND c.status_id IN (2, 3, 4)
    ORDER BY c.escalation_due_at
    LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p
) AS c1
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c1.status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c1.priority_id = p.priority_id
INNER JOIN categories AS c2 ON c1.category_id = c2.category_id
INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c2.department_id = d.department_id
INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c1.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c1.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
ORDER BY c1.escalation_due_at

SELECT c1.complaint_id, c1.category_id, c1.closed_at, c1.complaint_description, c1.complaint_title, c1.created_at, c1.current_handler_employee_id, c1.escalation_due_at, c1.escalation_level, c1.priority_id, c1.raised_by_employee_id, c1.reopened_count, c1.resolved_at, c1.status_id, c1.updated_at, c0.status_id, c0.is_terminal, c0.status_name, p.priority_id, p.escalation_order, p.priority_name, c2.category_id, c2.category_name, c2.created_at, c2.default_priority_id, c2.department_id, c2.is_active, c2.sla_hours, c2.updated_at, d.department_id, d.created_at, d.department_head_employee_id, d.department_name, d.is_active, d.updated_at, e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.role_id, e.updated_at, e0.employee_id, e0.created_at, e0.department_id, e0.email, e0.employee_name, e0.is_active, e0.mobile_number, e0.password_hash, e0.role_id, e0.updated_at
FROM (
    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at
    FROM complaints AS c
    WHERE c.current_handler_employee_id = @employeeId AND c.status_id IN (2, 3, 4)
    ORDER BY c.escalation_due_at
    LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p
) AS c1
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c1.status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c1.priority_id = p.priority_id
INNER JOIN categories AS c2 ON c1.category_id = c2.category_id
INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c2.department_id = d.department_id
INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c1.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c1.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
ORDER BY c1.escalation_due_at

FROM (
    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at
    FROM complaints AS c

    ORDER BY c.escalation_due_at

) AS c1

    INNER JOIN categories AS c1 ON c.category_id = c1.category_id

    FROM complaints AS c
    INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c.status_id = c0.status_id
    INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c.priority_id = p.priority_id
    INNER JOIN categories AS c1 ON c.category_id = c1.category_id
    INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c1.department_id = d.department_id
    INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
    LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
    WHERE c.complaint_id = @id
    LIMIT 1
) AS s

) AS c1

ORDER BY c1.created_at DESC

SELECT v.category_name, v.closed_at, v.complaint_id, v.complaint_title, v.created_at, v.current_handler_name, v.current_handler_role, v.department_name, v.escalation_due_at, v.escalation_level, v.is_terminal, v.priority_name, v.priority_weight, v.raised_by_name, v.reopened_count, v.resolved_at, v.status_name, v.updated_at
FROM v_complaint_dashboard AS v
INNER JOIN complaints AS c ON v.complaint_id = c.complaint_id
WHERE (c.raised_by_employee_id = @employeeIdFilter OR c.current_handler_employee_id = @employeeIdFilter1) AND c.raised_by_employee_id = @employeeIdFilter

INNER JOIN categories AS c0 ON c.category_id = c0.category_id
WHERE c0.department_id = @departmentId
GROUP BY c.category_id, c0.category_name
ORDER BY count(*)::int DESC

SELECT v.category_name, v.closed_at, v.complaint_id, v.complaint_title, v.created_at, v.current_handler_name, v.current_handler_role, v.department_name, v.escalation_due_at, v.escalation_level, v.is_terminal, v.priority_name, v.priority_weight, v.raised_by_name, v.reopened_count, v.resolved_at, v.status_name, v.updated_at
FROM v_complaint_dashboard AS v
INNER JOIN complaints AS c ON v.complaint_id = c.complaint_id
WHERE (c.raised_by_employee_id = @employeeIdFilter OR c.current_handler_employee_id = @employeeIdFilter1) AND c.raised_by_employee_id = @employeeIdFilter
ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
LIMIT @p4 OFFSET @p

SELECT e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.role_id, e.updated_at, r.role_id, r.created_at, r.role_name, d.department_id, d.created_at, d.department_head_employee_id, d.department_name, d.is_active, d.updated_at
FROM employees AS e
INNER JOIN roles AS r ON e.role_id = r.role_id
LEFT JOIN departments AS d ON e.department_id = d.department_id
WHERE e.email = @email AND e.is_active
LIMIT 1

SELECT c.category_id AS "CategoryId", c0.category_name AS "CategoryName", d.department_name AS "DepartmentName", count(*)::int AS "ComplaintCount"
FROM complaints AS c

INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c0.department_id = d.department_id
GROUP BY c.category_id, c0.category_name, d.department_name

SELECT c.category_id AS "CategoryId", c0.category_name AS "CategoryName", d.department_name AS "DepartmentName", count(*)::int AS "ComplaintCount"
FROM complaints AS c
INNER JOIN categories AS c0 ON c.category_id = c0.category_id
INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c0.department_id = d.department_id
GROUP BY c.category_id, c0.category_name, d.department_name

SELECT c.category_id AS "CategoryId", c0.category_name AS "CategoryName", d.department_name AS "DepartmentName", count(*)::int AS "ComplaintCount"
FROM complaints AS c
INNER JOIN categories AS c0 ON c.category_id = c0.category_id
INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c0.department_id = d.department_id
GROUP BY c.category_id, c0.category_name, d.department_name

    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS e0
INNER JOIN roles AS r ON e0.role_id = r.role_id
LEFT JOIN departments AS d ON e0.department_id = d.department_id
ORDER BY e0.employee_id

SELECT e0.employee_id, e0.created_at, e0.department_id, e0.email, e0.employee_name, e0.is_active, e0.mobile_number, e0.password_hash, e0.role_id, e0.updated_at, r.role_id, r.created_at, r.role_name, d.department_id, d.created_at, d.department_head_employee_id, d.department_name, d.is_active, d.updated_at
FROM (
    SELECT e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.role_id, e.updated_at
    FROM employees AS e
    ORDER BY e.employee_id
    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS e0

SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at, c0.category_id, c0.category_name, c0.created_at, c0.default_priority_id, c0.department_id, c0.is_active, c0.sla_hours, c0.updated_at, p.priority_id, p.escalation_order, p.priority_name, e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.role_id, e.updated_at
FROM complaints AS c
INNER JOIN categories AS c0 ON c.category_id = c0.category_id
INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c.priority_id = p.priority_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e ON c.current_handler_employee_id = e.employee_id
WHERE c.escalation_due_at <= now() AND c.status_id <> 6 AND c.status_id <> 7 AND c.status_id <> 9 AND c.status_id <> 5

SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at, c0.category_id, c0.category_name, c0.created_at, c0.default_priority_id, c0.department_id, c0.is_active, c0.sla_hours, c0.updated_at, p.priority_id, p.escalation_order, p.priority_name, e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.role_id, e.updated_at
FROM complaints AS c
INNER JOIN categories AS c0 ON c.category_id = c0.category_id
INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c.priority_id = p.priority_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e ON c.current_handler_employee_id = e.employee_id
WHERE c.escalation_due_at <= now() AND c.status_id <> 6 AND c.status_id <> 7 AND c.status_id <> 9 AND c.status_id <> 5

SELECT e0.employee_id, e0.created_at, e0.department_id, e0.email, e0.employee_name, e0.is_active, e0.mobile_number, e0.password_hash, e0.role_id, e0.updated_at, r.role_id, r.created_at, r.role_name, d.department_id, d.created_at, d.department_head_employee_id, d.department_name, d.is_active, d.updated_at
FROM (
    SELECT e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.role_id, e.updated_at
    FROM employees AS e
    ORDER BY e.employee_id
    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS e0
INNER JOIN roles AS r ON e0.role_id = r.role_id
LEFT JOIN departments AS d ON e0.department_id = d.department_id
ORDER BY e0.employee_id

    SELECT c.request_id, c.complaint_id, c.created_at, c.remarks, c.request_status_id, c.request_type_id, c.requested_by, c.reviewed_at, c.reviewed_by
    FROM complaint_requests AS c

    ORDER BY c.created_at DESC

) AS c1

ORDER BY c1.created_at DESC

SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at, c0.category_id, c0.category_name, c0.created_at, c0.default_priority_id, c0.department_id, c0.is_active, c0.sla_hours, c0.updated_at, p.priority_id, p.escalation_order, p.priority_name, e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.role_id, e.updated_at
FROM complaints AS c
INNER JOIN categories AS c0 ON c.category_id = c0.category_id
INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c.priority_id = p.priority_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e ON c.current_handler_employee_id = e.employee_id
WHERE c.escalation_due_at <= now() AND c.status_id <> 6 AND c.status_id <> 7 AND c.status_id <> 9 AND c.status_id <> 5

SELECT e0.employee_id, e0.created_at, e0.department_id, e0.email, e0.employee_name, e0.is_active, e0.mobile_number, e0.password_hash, e0.role_id, e0.updated_at, r.role_id, r.created_at, r.role_name, d.department_id, d.created_at, d.department_head_employee_id, d.department_name, d.is_active, d.updated_at

    FROM employees AS e
    ORDER BY e.employee_id
    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS e0

LEFT JOIN departments AS d ON e0.department_id = d.department_id
ORDER BY e0.employee_id

SELECT e0.employee_id, e0.created_at, e0.department_id, e0.email, e0.employee_name, e0.is_active, e0.mobile_number, e0.password_hash, e0.role_id, e0.updated_at, r.role_id, r.created_at, r.role_name, d.department_id, d.created_at, d.department_head_employee_id, d.department_name, d.is_active, d.updated_at

    WHERE e.is_active = @isActive_Value AND e.role_id = @roleId_Value

    ORDER BY c.escalation_due_at
    LIMIT @p3 OFFSET @p

SELECT c.category_id, c.category_name, c.created_at, c.default_priority_id, c.department_id, c.is_active, c.sla_hours, c.updated_at, d.department_id, d.created_at, d.department_head_employee_id, d.department_name, d.is_active, d.updated_at, p.priority_id, p.escalation_order, p.priority_name, e.escalation_rule_id, e.category_id, e.escalate_after_hours, e.escalation_level, e.priority_id
FROM categories AS c
INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c.department_id = d.department_id
INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c.default_priority_id = p.priority_id

WHERE c.is_active = @isActive_Value

SELECT c1.complaint_id, c1.category_id, c1.closed_at, c1.complaint_description, c1.complaint_title, c1.created_at, c1.current_handler_employee_id, c1.escalation_due_at, c1.escalation_level, c1.priority_id, c1.raised_by_employee_id, c1.reopened_count, c1.resolved_at, c1.status_id, c1.updated_at, c0.status_id, c0.is_terminal, c0.status_name, p.priority_id, p.escalation_order, p.priority_name, c2.category_id, c2.category_name, c2.created_at, c2.default_priority_id, c2.department_id, c2.is_active, c2.sla_hours, c2.updated_at, d.department_id, d.created_at, d.department_head_employee_id, d.department_name, d.is_active, d.updated_at, e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.role_id, e.updated_at, e0.employee_id, e0.created_at, e0.department_id, e0.email, e0.employee_name, e0.is_active, e0.mobile_number, e0.password_hash, e0.role_id, e0.updated_at
FROM (
    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at
    FROM complaints AS c
    WHERE c.current_handler_employee_id = @employeeId AND c.status_id IN (2, 3, 4)
    ORDER BY c.escalation_due_at
    LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p
) AS c1
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c1.status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c1.priority_id = p.priority_id
INNER JOIN categories AS c2 ON c1.category_id = c2.category_id
INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c2.department_id = d.department_id
INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c1.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c1.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
ORDER BY c1.escalation_due_at

    ORDER BY c.escalation_due_at

) AS c1

ORDER BY c1.escalation_due_at

SELECT e0.employee_id, e0.created_at, e0.department_id, e0.email, e0.employee_name, e0.is_active, e0.mobile_number, e0.password_hash, e0.role_id, e0.updated_at, r.role_id, r.created_at, r.role_name, d.department_id, d.created_at, d.department_head_employee_id, d.department_name, d.is_active, d.updated_at
FROM (
    SELECT e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.role_id, e.updated_at
    FROM employees AS e
    ORDER BY e.employee_id
    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS e0
INNER JOIN roles AS r ON e0.role_id = r.role_id
LEFT JOIN departments AS d ON e0.department_id = d.department_id
ORDER BY e0.employee_id

FROM complaints AS c

SELECT e0.employee_id, e0.created_at, e0.department_id, e0.email, e0.employee_name, e0.is_active, e0.mobile_number, e0.password_hash, e0.role_id, e0.updated_at, r.role_id, r.created_at, r.role_name, d.department_id, d.created_at, d.department_head_employee_id, d.department_name, d.is_active, d.updated_at
FROM (
    SELECT e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.role_id, e.updated_at
    FROM employees AS e
    ORDER BY e.employee_id
    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS e0
INNER JOIN roles AS r ON e0.role_id = r.role_id
LEFT JOIN departments AS d ON e0.department_id = d.department_id
ORDER BY e0.employee_id

SELECT e0.employee_id, e0.created_at, e0.department_id, e0.email, e0.employee_name, e0.is_active, e0.mobile_number, e0.password_hash, e0.role_id, e0.updated_at, r.role_id, r.created_at, r.role_name, d.department_id, d.created_at, d.department_head_employee_id, d.department_name, d.is_active, d.updated_at
FROM (
    SELECT e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.role_id, e.updated_at
    FROM employees AS e
    WHERE e.is_active = @isActive_Value AND e.role_id = @roleId_Value
    ORDER BY e.employee_id
    LIMIT @p3 OFFSET @p
) AS e0
INNER JOIN roles AS r ON e0.role_id = r.role_id
LEFT JOIN departments AS d ON e0.department_id = d.department_id
ORDER BY e0.employee_id

SELECT c1.request_id, c1.complaint_id, c1.created_at, c1.remarks, c1.request_status_id, c1.request_type_id, c1.requested_by, c1.reviewed_at, c1.reviewed_by, c0.complaint_id, c0.category_id, c0.closed_at, c0.complaint_description, c0.complaint_title, c0.created_at, c0.current_handler_employee_id, c0.escalation_due_at, c0.escalation_level, c0.priority_id, c0.raised_by_employee_id, c0.reopened_count, c0.resolved_at, c0.status_id, c0.updated_at, r.request_type_id, r.request_type_name, r0.request_status_id, r0.status_name, e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.role_id, e.updated_at, e0.employee_id, e0.created_at, e0.department_id, e0.email, e0.employee_name, e0.is_active, e0.mobile_number, e0.password_hash, e0.role_id, e0.updated_at
FROM (
    SELECT c.request_id, c.complaint_id, c.created_at, c.remarks, c.request_status_id, c.request_type_id, c.requested_by, c.reviewed_at, c.reviewed_by
    FROM complaint_requests AS c
    WHERE c.request_type_id = @requestTypeId_Value
    ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
    LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p
) AS c1
INNER JOIN complaints AS c0 ON c1.complaint_id = c0.complaint_id
INNER JOIN request_types AS r ON c1.request_type_id = r.request_type_id
INNER JOIN request_statuses AS r0 ON c1.request_status_id = r0.request_status_id
INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c1.requested_by = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c1.reviewed_by = e0.employee_id
ORDER BY c1.created_at DESC

SELECT c.category_id, c.category_name, c.created_at, c.default_priority_id, c.department_id, c.is_active, c.sla_hours, c.updated_at, d.department_id, d.created_at, d.department_head_employee_id, d.department_name, d.is_active, d.updated_at, p.priority_id, p.escalation_order, p.priority_name, e.escalation_rule_id, e.category_id, e.escalate_after_hours, e.escalation_level, e.priority_id
FROM categories AS c
INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c.department_id = d.department_id
INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c.default_priority_id = p.priority_id
LEFT JOIN escalation_rules AS e ON c.category_id = e.category_id
WHERE c.is_active = @isActive_Value
ORDER BY c.category_name, c.category_id, d.department_id, p.priority_id

SELECT c1.complaint_id, c1.category_id, c1.closed_at, c1.complaint_description, c1.complaint_title, c1.created_at, c1.current_handler_employee_id, c1.escalation_due_at, c1.escalation_level, c1.priority_id, c1.raised_by_employee_id, c1.reopened_count, c1.resolved_at, c1.status_id, c1.updated_at, c0.status_id, c0.is_terminal, c0.status_name, p.priority_id, p.escalation_order, p.priority_name, c2.category_id, c2.category_name, c2.created_at, c2.default_priority_id, c2.department_id, c2.is_active, c2.sla_hours, c2.updated_at, d.department_id, d.created_at, d.department_head_employee_id, d.department_name, d.is_active, d.updated_at, e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.role_id, e.updated_at, e0.employee_id, e0.created_at, e0.department_id, e0.email, e0.employee_name, e0.is_active, e0.mobile_number, e0.password_hash, e0.role_id, e0.updated_at
FROM (
    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at
    FROM complaints AS c
    WHERE c.current_handler_employee_id = @employeeId AND c.status_id IN (2, 3, 4)
    ORDER BY c.escalation_due_at
    LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p
) AS c1
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c1.status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c1.priority_id = p.priority_id
INNER JOIN categories AS c2 ON c1.category_id = c2.category_id
INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c2.department_id = d.department_id
INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c1.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c1.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
ORDER BY c1.escalation_due_at

FROM (
    SELECT c.category_id, c.category_name, c.created_at, c.default_priority_id, c.department_id, c.is_active, c.sla_hours, c.updated_at, d.department_id AS department_id0, d.created_at AS created_at0, d.department_head_employee_id, d.department_name, d.is_active AS is_active0, d.updated_at AS updated_at0, p.priority_id, p.escalation_order, p.priority_name
    FROM categories AS c
    INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c.department_id = d.department_id

) AS s

    SELECT c.category_id, c.category_name, c.created_at, c.default_priority_id, c.department_id, c.is_active, c.sla_hours, c.updated_at, d.department_id AS department_id0, d.created_at AS created_at0, d.department_head_employee_id, d.department_name, d.is_active AS is_active0, d.updated_at AS updated_at0, p.priority_id, p.escalation_order, p.priority_name
    FROM categories AS c
    INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c.department_id = d.department_id
    INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c.default_priority_id = p.priority_id
    WHERE c.category_id = @categoryId
    LIMIT 1
) AS s
LEFT JOIN escalation_rules AS e ON s.category_id = e.category_id
ORDER BY s.category_id, s.department_id0, s.priority_id

SELECT e0.employee_id, e0.created_at, e0.department_id, e0.email, e0.employee_name, e0.is_active, e0.mobile_number, e0.password_hash, e0.role_id, e0.updated_at, r.role_id, r.created_at, r.role_name, d.department_id, d.created_at, d.department_head_employee_id, d.department_name, d.is_active, d.updated_at
FROM (
    SELECT e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.role_id, e.updated_at
    FROM employees AS e
    ORDER BY e.employee_id
    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS e0
INNER JOIN roles AS r ON e0.role_id = r.role_id
LEFT JOIN departments AS d ON e0.department_id = d.department_id
ORDER BY e0.employee_id

SELECT e0.employee_id, e0.created_at, e0.department_id, e0.email, e0.employee_name, e0.is_active, e0.mobile_number, e0.password_hash, e0.role_id, e0.updated_at, r.role_id, r.created_at, r.role_name, d.department_id, d.created_at, d.department_head_employee_id, d.department_name, d.is_active, d.updated_at
FROM (
    SELECT e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.role_id, e.updated_at
    FROM employees AS e
    ORDER BY e.employee_id
    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS e0
INNER JOIN roles AS r ON e0.role_id = r.role_id

ORDER BY e0.employee_id

SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at, c0.category_id, c0.category_name, c0.created_at, c0.default_priority_id, c0.department_id, c0.is_active, c0.sla_hours, c0.updated_at, p.priority_id, p.escalation_order, p.priority_name, e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.role_id, e.updated_at

SELECT e0.employee_id, e0.created_at, e0.department_id, e0.email, e0.employee_name, e0.is_active, e0.mobile_number, e0.password_hash, e0.role_id, e0.updated_at, r.role_id, r.created_at, r.role_name, d.department_id, d.created_at, d.department_head_employee_id, d.department_name, d.is_active, d.updated_at
FROM (
    SELECT e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.role_id, e.updated_at
    FROM employees AS e
    WHERE e.is_active = @isActive_Value AND e.role_id = @roleId_Value
    ORDER BY e.employee_id
    LIMIT @p3 OFFSET @p
) AS e0
INNER JOIN roles AS r ON e0.role_id = r.role_id
LEFT JOIN departments AS d ON e0.department_id = d.department_id
ORDER BY e0.employee_id

FROM (
    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at
    FROM complaints AS c
    WHERE c.current_handler_employee_id = @employeeId AND c.status_id IN (2, 3, 4)
    ORDER BY c.escalation_due_at
    LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p
) AS c1
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c1.status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c1.priority_id = p.priority_id
INNER JOIN categories AS c2 ON c1.category_id = c2.category_id
INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c2.department_id = d.department_id
INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c1.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c1.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
ORDER BY c1.escalation_due_at

FROM (
    SELECT c.category_id, c.category_name, c.created_at, c.default_priority_id, c.department_id, c.is_active, c.sla_hours, c.updated_at, d.department_id AS department_id0, d.created_at AS created_at0, d.department_head_employee_id, d.department_name, d.is_active AS is_active0, d.updated_at AS updated_at0, p.priority_id, p.escalation_order, p.priority_name
    FROM categories AS c

) AS s
LEFT JOIN escalation_rules AS e ON s.category_id = e.category_id

SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at, c0.category_id, c0.category_name, c0.created_at, c0.default_priority_id, c0.department_id, c0.is_active, c0.sla_hours, c0.updated_at, p.priority_id, p.escalation_order, p.priority_name, e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.role_id, e.updated_at
FROM complaints AS c
INNER JOIN categories AS c0 ON c.category_id = c0.category_id
INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c.priority_id = p.priority_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e ON c.current_handler_employee_id = e.employee_id
WHERE c.escalation_due_at <= now() AND c.status_id <> 6 AND c.status_id <> 7 AND c.status_id <> 9 AND c.status_id <> 5
2026-06-26 17:10:31.085 +05:30 [INF] HTTP OPTIONS /api/notification/unread-count responded 204 in 0.1505 ms
2026-06-26 17:10:31.098 +05:30 [INF] Executed DbCommand (3ms) [Parameters=[@employeeId='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT count(*)::int
FROM notifications AS n

SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at, c0.category_id, c0.category_name, c0.created_at, c0.default_priority_id, c0.department_id, c0.is_active, c0.sla_hours, c0.updated_at, p.priority_id, p.escalation_order, p.priority_name, e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.role_id, e.updated_at
FROM complaints AS c
INNER JOIN categories AS c0 ON c.category_id = c0.category_id
INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c.priority_id = p.priority_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e ON c.current_handler_employee_id = e.employee_id
WHERE c.escalation_due_at <= now() AND c.status_id <> 6 AND c.status_id <> 7 AND c.status_id <> 9 AND c.status_id <> 5
